name: F-2 rubric runner: second run of the same filter shows cache_hits > 0 (proves cache is hot)
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/runner.sh" --filter "cl414-Q-1-space-config-yaml-ships" >/dev/null 2>&1; out=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/runner.sh" --stats --filter "cl414-Q-1-space-config-yaml-ships" 2>&1); echo "$out" | grep -qE "cache_hits=[1-9]" && echo cache_hit 1>&2
